SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit

Class BukkitThreading

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitThreading
public final class BukkitThreading extends Object
Utility for handling cross-platform threading between standard Bukkit and Folia.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    isFoliaRuntime()
    Checks if the current runtime is Folia (region-based threading).
    static boolean
    isGlobalThread()
    Checks whether the current thread is already the Folia global tick thread.
    static boolean
    isOwnedByCurrentRegion(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
    Checks if the given entity is owned by the current region.
    static void
    runEntity(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity, Runnable task)
    Runs a task on the region owning the given entity.
    static void
    runForSender(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, Runnable task)
    Runs a task for the given command sender, targeting their region if they are an entity.
    static void
    runGlobal(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, Runnable task)
    Runs a task on the global main thread (or global region in Folia).

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • isFoliaRuntime

      public static boolean isFoliaRuntime()
      Checks if the current runtime is Folia (region-based threading).
      Returns:
      true if Folia, false otherwise

    • runGlobal

      public static void runGlobal(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, Runnable task)
      Runs a task on the global main thread (or global region in Folia).
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance
      task - task to run

    • runEntity

      public static void runEntity(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity, Runnable task)
      Runs a task on the region owning the given entity. Falls back to global region if Folia is not present or entity is null.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance
      entity - entity to use for region targeting
      task - task to run

    • runForSender

      public static void runForSender(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, Runnable task)
      Runs a task for the given command sender, targeting their region if they are an entity.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance
      sender - sender to target
      task - task to run

    • isOwnedByCurrentRegion

      public static boolean isOwnedByCurrentRegion(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
      Checks if the given entity is owned by the current region. Always returns true on standard Bukkit if on the primary thread.
      Parameters:
      entity - entity to check
      Returns:
      true if owned by current region

    • isGlobalThread

      public static boolean isGlobalThread()
      Checks whether the current thread is already the Folia global tick thread. Falls back to Bukkit's primary-thread probe when the dedicated Folia API is unavailable.
      Returns:
      true when the current thread can execute global tasks inline
